'''Podlong Foahl''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] who worked as a luggage loader aboard the ''[[Aurorient Express]]'', under [[Chief Purser]] [[Waverton]]. Secretly a [[Pressure pirates|pressure pirate]], he attempted to steal valuables from the cargo of the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] passengers during its attempted hijacking, though he was shot and [[Death/Legends|killed]] by Waverton.
